hearings.title: Unidentified Flying Objects
hearings.summary: A House Armed Services hearing addressing unidentified flying objects and the Air Force investigation program during the period of the Michigan sightings.

hearings.title: Symposium on Unidentified Flying Objects
hearings.summary: A congressional scientific symposium presenting testimony and prepared material on UFO reports, research methods, physical evidence, and possible explanations.

hearings.title: Pre-Hearing Classified UAP Briefing
hearings.summary: A classified congressional briefing held before the May 17, 2022 public hearing on unidentified aerial phenomena.

hearings.title: Unidentified Aerial Phenomena
hearings.summary: An open hearing followed by a closed classified briefing on the Department of Defense and Intelligence Community response to unidentified aerial phenomena, including reporting, stigma, flight safety, national security, data collection, analysis, and the creation of AOIMSG.

hearings.title: Mission, Activities, Oversight, and Budget of the All-Domain Anomaly Resolution Office
hearings.summary: An open Senate hearing examining AARO's mission, activities, oversight, budget, reporting process, and analysis of UAP cases.

hearings.title: UAP Disclosure Act of 2023 — Congressional Consideration
hearings.summary: Congressional consideration of UAP disclosure provisions proposed for the Fiscal Year 2024 defense and intelligence authorization process.

hearings.title: Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena: Implications on National Security, Public Safety, and Government Transparency
hearings.summary: A public House hearing examining military and commercial aviation encounters with unidentified anomalous phenomena, federal handling and classification of UAP information, whistleblower protections, public safety, national security, and congressional oversight.

hearings.title: Congressional Classified AARO Briefings During 2023
hearings.summary: An aggregate research record for publicly acknowledged classified AARO briefings to authorized congressional committees during 2023.

hearings.title: House Classified UAP Briefing
hearings.summary: A closed briefing concerning UAP whistleblower allegations and congressional access to information held by the intelligence community.

hearings.title: Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena: Exposing the Truth
hearings.summary: A joint House Oversight hearing examining government transparency, alleged secret UAP programs, aviation and maritime safety, scientific study, whistleblower concerns, and congressional access to UAP information.

hearings.title: Activities of the All-Domain Anomaly Resolution Office
hearings.summary: An open Senate hearing receiving an update on AARO's activities, priorities, case holdings, data collection, transparency, and unresolved reports.

hearings.title: Congressional Classified AARO Briefing During 2024
hearings.summary: A classified briefing involving AARO Director Jon Kosloski and House Oversight members following the November 2024 public hearings.

hearings.title: Fiscal Year 2025 NDAA — UAP-Related Congressional Action
hearings.summary: A research record for UAP-related provisions and proposals considered during the Fiscal Year 2025 National Defense Authorization Act process.

hearings.title: Restoring Public Trust Through UAP Transparency and Whistleblower Protection
hearings.summary: A public hearing examining UAP disclosure, AARO and intelligence-community transparency, witness accounts, and protections for national-security whistleblowers.

hearings.title: Fiscal Year 2026 NDAA — UAP-Related Congressional Action
hearings.summary: A research record for UAP-related provisions, reporting requirements, and oversight proposals considered during the Fiscal Year 2026 NDAA process.
